first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core justification for the score (lack of C++/Windows and fixed-income domain experience) is consistent across both evaluations. While the specific points in the strengths and concerns sections are rephrased and one new concern is introduced in the variant (regarding CI/CD, which was a strength in the baseline), these changes represent run-to-run noise and a shift in focus to different technical details. There is no evidence that the reasoning was altered due to the name change, as the evaluation of the candidate's fit for the role remains fundamentally the same.
